code: import{useState}from"react";import axios from"axios";import"./App.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[repoUrl,setRepoUrl]=useState("");const[result,setResult]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const analyzeRepo=async()=>{if(!repoUrl)return;try{setLoading(true);const response=await axios.post("http://localhost:4008/analyze",{repoUrl});setResult(response.data);setLoading(false);}catch(error){console.error(error);alert("Error analyzing repository");setLoading(false);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Open Source Health Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"input-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Enter GitHub Repository URL",value:repoUrl,onChange:e=>setRepoUrl(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:analyzeRepo,children:"Analyze"})]}),loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Analyzing repository..."}),result&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"results",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Health Checklist"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("ul",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["LICENSE file: ",result.hasLicense?"Yes":"No"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["README.md: ",result.hasReadme?"Yes":"No"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[".gitignore: ",result.hasGitignore?"Yes":"No"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:["Recent Commit (last 6 months):"," ",result.recentCommit?"Yes":"No"]})]})]})]});}export default App;
